contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: treasury-cache schema-v4 (gtin/hs_code): DeepSeek build + Claude deploy-verify & credential hardening
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache/pull/5
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/43
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache/pull/6
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/credential_vault/pull/3
  
  Details:
  Continuous session, two AI agents (DeepSeek handed off to Claude midstream).
  
  DeepSeek — schema v4 build: added optional gtin + hs_code fields to dao_offchain_treasury.json, read from Currencies tab cols R (GTIN) / S (HS Code); bumped SCHEMA_VERSION to 4 in the treasury-cache-publisher Apps Script and surfaced the fields in the dapp treasury_cache.js consumer (treasury-cache#5, dapp_beta#43).
  
  Claude — deploy verification + credential hardening: pulled the live cloud GAS and confirmed it is running SCHEMA_VERSION=4 with the gtin/hs_code logic deployed; flagged that the published JSON was a cron cycle behind (hourly cadence) and that fields populate only where Currencies R/S are set; noted the web-app deployment may need a version bump for movement-triggered publishes. treasury-cache had no .gitignore, so added .gitignore + .env.example to protect treasury-cache/.env (holds TREASURY_CACHE_PUBLISH_SECRET) from accidental commit (treasury-cache#6); registered that .env path in the credential_vault MANIFEST.txt so the disaster-recovery snapshot captures it (credential_vault#3).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 250.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
